exception_notes.arxiv_weekend: 3 ArXiv papers from June 27 — ArXiv does not process submissions on weekends (Sat-Sun). Applied 'position 1-3 on recent page' rule.
exception_notes.youtube_metadata: 3 YouTube items use search-based metadata since direct video pages require JavaScript render. Channel URLs confirmed valid.

batches.notes: Thai sources: only Blognone had content in 24h window. Beartai last article was March 2026 (107 days gap). Techsauce and others had no AI-relevant content.
July 4 is US Independence Day — fewer direct sources active. BuildFastWithAI '15 Biggest Stories' digest provided comprehensive aggregated coverage. TechCrunch published 2 articles on July 4.

ArXiv: weekend gap — no new submissions July 4-5. Applied 'position 1-3 recent page' rule, selected papers 2606.15958, 2606.15903, 2606.15899 from June 27. YouTube: 3 channels tracked, metadata from search.

special_notes: July 4, 2026 = US Independence Day: reduced direct article output from US sources (TechCrunch, VentureBeat, TheVerge). BuildFastWithAI '15 Biggest Stories' digest provided excellent aggregated coverage.
ArXiv weekend gap: no new AI paper submissions on Sat July 4 and Sun July 5. Applied 'top position recent page' rule — selected 3 highest-impact papers from June 27 positions 1-3.
Thai source coverage limited: only Blognone active with 2 articles. Beartai has 107-day content gap. Other Thai sources (Techsauce, NECTEC, DEPA) had no AI-relevant content in window.
Breakthrough potential articles: Grok 4.5 V9 (1.5T params + Cursor training), LongCat-2.0 (Chinese chips frontier model), Meta Watermelon (GPT-5.5 class 10x compute).
Top urgency stories: Grok 4.5 V9, LongCat-2.0 Chinese chips, Anthropic closes Chinese loopholes, SkillVetBench LLM judge security, Anthropic HackerOne bug bounty.
